password.title: Password
password.description: Your Nanit account password (optional if using refreshToken)

refreshToken.title: Refresh Token
refreshToken.description: Long-lived refresh token from nanit-auth CLI (recommended over password)

mfa_code.title: MFA Code
mfa_code.description: Multi-factor authentication code (only needed for initial setup if MFA is enabled)

refreshInterval.title: Refresh Interval
refreshInterval.description: How often to refresh camera list and sensor data (in seconds)

streamMode.title: Stream Mode
streamMode.description: Streaming mode: cloud (RTMPS from Nanit servers), local (WebSocket to camera on LAN), auto (try local first, fallback to cloud)

localRtmpPort.title: Local RTMP Port
localRtmpPort.description: Port for local RTMP server (only used for local/auto modes)
